{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Murayano Shrine'''|杜屋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Nagato Province]].
